A.label: Scenario A — During War
A.description: Trust capitalised from assets legally available during active conflict. Frozen principal stays in custodian accounts pending legal resolution. ERA loan proceeds and multilateral pledges form the initial corpus.

B.label: Scenario B — Post-War
B.description: Post-war Trust capitalised from full reparations settlement and frozen-asset transfer. Larger corpus but longer mobilisation timeline — depends on legal resolution.
